/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cfd_studio.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cfd_studio.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio.dir/src/cfd_app.c.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio.dir/src/ui/gui_framework.c.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio.dir/src/ui/control_panel.c.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio.dir/src/viewport/viewport_3d.c.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio.dir/src/physics/heat_transfer.c.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio.dir/src/physics/atmosphere.c.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio.dir/src/physics/forces.c.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio.dir/src/physics/units.c.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio.dir/src/models/model_manager.c.o -o cfd_studio   -L/home/grep/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/grep/local/lib:/home/grep/local/home/grep/local/lib: /home/grep/local/home/grep/local/lib/libraylib.so -lm
